directions.displayValue: In a large stockpot, melt 2 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Saute onions, mushrooms and celery in butter until tender.
Add chicken stock and potatoes; simmer for 10 minutes.
Add fish, and simmer another 10 minutes.
Season to taste with Old Bay seasoning, salt and pepper.
Mix together clam juice and flour until smooth; stir into soup.
Remove from heat, and stir in evaporated milk. Serve.
